summary: Remote install bar flips to Verifying at ~95%, not full 100% (live A100, LTX GGUF install). Regresses the MPI-140 fill-then-verify contract; reads as a missing file. Root suspected = models:install-verifying re-broadcasts an aggregate progress that dips below 1.0. Fix = pin progress to 1.0 for the post-download verify sweep.

note: Fix committed 63a9b58: _depDenominator real-total-wins + verifying sweep gated on all-deps-byte-complete (pins bar 100%). Logic-verified only; needs live fresh-Pod LTX GGUF install to confirm bar hits visible 100% then Verifying then INSTALLED.
Live test round 1: bar fills 100% + Preparing OK, but sweep gated off by requirements-only custom-node dep (0 bytes through pip). Fix 445d647: exclude custom_nodes from byte gate. Needs live round 2.

reason: Bar-100% + Preparing + no-early-Verifying proven live; end-of-install 'Verifying…' sweep not yet visually confirmed on a multi-GB weight install.
